name: Moses H. Cone Memorial Hospital v. Mercury Construction Corp.
summary: The Supreme Court articulated the principle that the FAA embodies a 'liberal federal policy favoring arbitration agreements,' and that any doubts about arbitrability should be resolved in favor of arbitration.
significance: Established the strong federal policy favoring arbitration under the FAA, which petitioner relies on to argue that exemptions to the FAA should be construed narrowly.
